creator: v.haisman@sh.cvut.cz
text:
This is an attempt to resurrect the Bacula version 2.4.4 port which has been killed by version 3.x. Version 3.x does not talk to 2.x servers.

In case the attachment does not make it through: <http://shell.sh.cvut.cz/~wilx/bacula2.shar>

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
